title: Wellness Intervention
description: Records a wellness intervention event generated by the journal SVA tier protocol. These records describe what intervention was offered and at what tier — they do NOT contain entity maps, entity hashes, or any raw journal text, satisfying the safe_person_escalation_aggregate_only invariant.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this intervention record (UUID or similar).

session_id.description: The session in which the intervention was triggered.

user_id.description: Pseudonymous user identifier of the student.

action.description: Machine-readable action token dispatched for this intervention.

aggregate_evidence.description: AGGREGATE-ONLY statistical evidence. No entity maps, hashes, or text.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the intervention was triggered.

turn_number.description: Turn number within the session at which the intervention fired.

counters_snapshot.description: Module-state counter values at the time of intervention.

mean_valence.description: Mean valence across entities in this turn. No per-entity breakdown.

mean_arousal.description: Mean arousal across entities in this turn.

entity_count.description: Number of distinct entities detected. Not their identities.

sustained_elevation_count.description: Number of consecutive turns meeting tier1 threshold.
